name: The SCP Foundation
description:
Hey everyone. I’ve decided to write a bot again with a small number of tokens. I haven’t added the Chaos Insurgency or the Global Occult Coalition to the world yet, but I hope that doesn’t ruin your gaming experience.

By the way, I wasn’t allowed to write too many words again due to the 84,000-word limit...
creator: The_Ueser_One
